{"messages": [{"content": "Please analyze my business documents and provide a summary.", "additional_kwargs": {}, "response_metadata": {}, "type": "human", "name": null, "id": "4f902c51-ae06-47a4-aed4-d359f8eea093"}], "user_context": {"business_name": "Urban Plant Life", "business_type": "Boutique Plant Shop & Interior Greening Consultancy", "location": "Cairo, Egypt", "stage": "Growth", "goals": ["Reconnect urban dwellers with nature", "Achieve scalable growth", "Secure loyal market share"], "constraints": ["Small team", "Limited budget", "Apartment living challenges for customers", "Time-poor customers"], "target_audience": "Eco-Conscious Millennial Professional", "sector": "E-commerce", "available_documents": ["Document.pdf"]}, "onboarding_status": "completed", "onboarding_files": null, "processed_files": [{"filename": "Document.pdf", "content": "CONFIDENTIAL STRATEGY DOCUMENT Urban Plant Life: Growth & Identity Roadmap 
Date: December 2025 
1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY Urban Plant Life is positioned as Cairo’s premier "green 
sanctuary" for the modern professional. We are not just selling plants; we are selling a 
lifestyle of serenity, sustainability, and aesthetic enhancement. Our business model 
bridges the gap between a traditional nursery and a high-end interior decor consultancy. 
2. BUSINESS IDENTITY 
• Business Type: Boutique Plant Shop & Interior Greening Consultancy. 
• Location: Cairo, Egypt (Physical Hub) + Online Store. 
• Mission: To reconnect urban dwellers with nature through curated plant collections 
and education. 
3. BRAND VOICE & TONE Our brand voice is the "Knowledgeable Gardener Friend." It 
strikes a balance between expertise and accessibility. 
• Key Attributes: Organic, Community-Focused, Knowledgeable, Serene. 
• Tone Guidelines: 
o Avoid: Overly academic botanical jargon (unless explained). 
o Embrace: Warm, encouraging language. We celebrate growth and patience. 
o Style: Visuals should be earthy, unpolished, and authentic. Captions should 
feel personal, using "we" and "our community" rather than corporate speak. 
4. TARGET AUDIENCE ANALYSIS Our primary customer base is the "Eco-Conscious 
Millennial Professional." 
• Demographics: Ages 25–45, living in Cairo metropolitan areas (Zamalek, Maadi, 
New Cairo). High disposable income, lives in apartments. 
• Psychographics: 
o Values mental health and "slow living." 
o Views plant care as a form of self-care. 
o Willing to pay a premium for "guaranteed" plant health and after-sales 
support. 
• Secondary Audience: Corporate offices seeking biophilic design to improve 
employee productivity. 
 

[INSERT PAGE BREAK HERE] 
 
[PAGE 2 START] 
5. STRATEGIC GOALS (SWOT INTEGRATION) 
Addressing Weaknesses: 
• Constraint: Small Team & Limited Budget. 
• Strategy: We cannot out-spend competitors on ads. Instead, we will leverage User 
Generated Content (UGC). We will incentivize customers to post their plants with 
the hashtag #MyUrbanJungle, effectively turning our customer base into our 
marketing team. Automation tools will handle routine inventory queries to free up 
staff time. 
Capitalizing on Opportunities: 
• Opportunity: E-commerce Expansion & Niche Markets. 
• Strategy: The "Digital-Physical Hybrid" model. 
o Q1 Action: Launch the "Cairo Shade Collection"—a specific bundle of plants 
guaranteed to thrive in low-light apartments, addressing a common pain 
point for our audience. 
o Partnerships: Collaborate with local ceramic artisans to offer exclusive 
pots, creating a unique value proposition that large competitors cannot 
replicate. 
6. OPERATIONAL PRIORITIES 
Supply Chain: Secure contracts with local growers to reduce import costs and carbon 
footprint. 
1. Customer Education: Launch weekly "Plant Clinic" Instagram Live sessions to 
reduce refund rates caused by plant death. 
2. Data Security: Ensure all e-commerce transactions and customer data comply 
with GDPR and local privacy laws (a key risk identified in our initial risk 
assessment). 

7. CONCLUSION Urban Plant Life is poised for scalable growth. By strictly adhering to our 
"Scientific yet Trustworthy" brand voice and focusing on the specific constraints of our 
target audience (apartment living, time-poor), we will secure a loyal market share despite 
the presence of larger, generic competitors. 
 "}], "next_agent": null, "action": "reply", "iteration_count": 2, "task_type": null, "search_query": null, "final_plan": null, "research_offline": {"question": "Urban Plant Life boutique plant shop interior greening consultancy business documents analysis summary business plan templates strategies for plant nursery flower shop greening services market analysis operations financials goals growth loyal customers urban dwellers scalable growth", "summary": "No relevant information found in knowledge base.", "claims": [], "contradictions": [], "missing_info": ["No data available for this query in the knowledge base."], "status": "no_results"}, "research_online": {"question": "Urban Plant Life boutique plant shop interior greening consultancy business documents analysis summary business plan templates strategies for plant nursery flower shop greening services market analysis operations financials goals growth loyal customers urban dwellers scalable growth", "summary": "Business plan templates for urban plant boutiques, nurseries, flower shops, and greening consultancies emphasize urban storefront setups, targeting urban dwellers and professionals; key sections include market analysis ($54B global in 2025), operations, financial goals (50% margins, 10-20% growth), customer loyalty strategies, and scalable revenue from plants, services, and workshops.", "findings": [{"pattern": "Target urban dwellers (ages 25-45 apartment residents), home gardeners, interior decorators, landscapers, offices/hotels; focus on customer loyalty via service, quality, workshops.", "scope": "global", "sources": [{"url": "https://upmetrics.co/template/plant-nursery-business-plan", "title": "Plant Nursery Business Plan Template + Guide [Updated 2025 ]"}, {"url": "https://www.shopify.com/sg/blog/business-plan-examples", "title": "10 Business Plan Examples & Templates (2026 Update) - Shopify"}, {"url": "https://www.liveplan.com/sample-business-plans/retail-and-ecommerce/garden-nursery-business-plan", "title": "Garden Nursery Business Plan - LivePlan"}], "approx_date_range": "2025-2026"}, {"pattern": "Market size $54B in 2025 for nursery/garden stores; competitive edge via urban locations, diverse inventory (potted plants, seedlings, tools), online/offline sales, greening services.", "scope": "global", "sources": [{"url": "https://upmetrics.co/template/plant-nursery-business-plan", "title": "Plant Nursery Business Plan Template + Guide [Updated 2025 ]"}, {"url": "https://safnow.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/Business-Plan-Template-for-a-Retail-Florist-Business.pdf", "title": "Business Plan Template for a Retail Florist Business"}], "approx_date_range": "2025"}, {"pattern": "Operations: urban storefront/greenhouse setups, knowledgeable staff, delivery; financials target 50% gross margins, $1K daily sales, 10-20% annual growth, break-even in 12 months.", "scope": "global", "sources": [{"url": "https://www.liveplan.com/sample-business-plans/retail-and-ecommerce/garden-nursery-business-plan", "title": "Garden Nursery Business Plan - LivePlan"}, {"url": "https://extension.psu.edu/example-business-plan/", "title": "Example Business Plan - Penn State Extension"}, {"url": "https://financialmodelslab.com/products/indoor-plant-care-services-business-plan", "title": "Indoor Plant Care Business Plan - Financial Models Lab"}], "approx_date_range": "2025"}, {"pattern": "Scalable growth strategies: expand locations after 3-5 years, add species/services, multichannel marketing, subscriptions/workshops for loyal urban customers.", "scope": "global", "sources": [{"url": "https://upmetrics.co/template/plant-nursery-business-plan", "title": "Plant Nursery Business Plan Template + Guide [Updated 2025 ]"}, {"url": "https://extension.psu.edu/example-business-plan/", "title": "Example Business Plan - Penn State Extension"}], "approx_date_range": "2025"}], "freshness_days": 0, "assumptions": ["Sources provide global templates adaptable to urban plant shops/greening consultancies; no Egypt-specific data.", "Market projections like $54B are US/global benchmarks, not localized.", "Templates assume standard retail/consultancy models without regulatory details."], "prohibited_uses": ["Not legal advice", "Not guaranteed to apply to specific startup", "May be outdated", "Requires expert validation in Egypt"], "status": "success"}, "final_reply": "Hello! I'm your Chief Operations Officer assistant for Urban Plant Life. I'm ready to help you analyze your business documents and provide strategic insights.

However, I notice you've asked me to "analyze your business documents," but I don't currently have access to your specific internal documents, financial statements, or operational data.

To provide you with a meaningful analysis, I can help you in several ways:

**Option 1: Strategic Advisory**
If you'd like me to provide strategic guidance on boutique plant shop operations, interior greening consultancy models, or how to achieve your goals around reconnecting urban dwellers with nature and securing scalable growth, I can synthesize best practices from the industry.

**Option 2: Document Review**
If you'd like to share specific details about your current business structure, financials, operations, or challenges, I can analyze those and provide targeted recommendations.

**Option 3: Gap Analysis**
If you'd like me to identify operational gaps or areas for improvement in your business model, I can conduct a structured analysis.

Which would be most helpful for you right now? Or if you have specific business documents you'd like me to review, please share the key details and I'll provide a comprehensive summary and analysis."}

Date: December 2025 
1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY Urban Plant Life is positioned as Cairo’s premier "green 
sanctuary" for the modern professional. We are not just selling plants; we are selling a 
lifestyle of serenity, sustainability, and aesthetic enhancement. Our business model 
bridges the gap between a traditional nursery and a high-end interior decor consultancy. 
2. BUSINESS IDENTITY 
• Business Type: Boutique Plant Shop & Interior Greening Consultancy. 
• Location: Cairo, Egypt (Physical Hub) + Online Store. 
• Mission: To reconnect urban dwellers with nature through curated plant collections 
and education. 
3. BRAND VOICE & TONE Our brand voice is the "Knowledgeable Gardener Friend." It 
strikes a balance between expertise and accessibility. 
• Key Attributes: Organic, Community-Focused, Knowledgeable, Serene. 
• Tone Guidelines: 
o Avoid: Overly academic botanical jargon (unless explained). 
o Embrace: Warm, encouraging language. We celebrate growth and patience. 
o Style: Visuals should be earthy, unpolished, and authentic. Captions should 
feel personal, using "we" and "our community" rather than corporate speak. 
4. TARGET AUDIENCE ANALYSIS Our primary customer base is the "Eco-Conscious 
Millennial Professional." 
• Demographics: Ages 25–45, living in Cairo metropolitan areas (Zamalek, Maadi, 
New Cairo). High disposable income, lives in apartments. 
• Psychographics: 
o Values mental health and "slow living." 
o Views plant care as a form of self-care. 
o Willing to pay a premium for "guaranteed" plant health and after-sales 
support. 
• Secondary Audience: Corporate offices seeking biophilic design to improve 
employee productivity. 
 

[INSERT PAGE BREAK HERE] 
 
[PAGE 2 START] 
5. STRATEGIC GOALS (SWOT INTEGRATION) 
Addressing Weaknesses: 
• Constraint: Small Team & Limited Budget. 
• Strategy: We cannot out-spend competitors on ads. Instead, we will leverage User 
Generated Content (UGC). We will incentivize customers to post their plants with 
the hashtag #MyUrbanJungle, effectively turning our customer base into our 
marketing team. Automation tools will handle routine inventory queries to free up 
staff time. 
Capitalizing on Opportunities: 
• Opportunity: E-commerce Expansion & Niche Markets. 
• Strategy: The "Digital-Physical Hybrid" model. 
o Q1 Action: Launch the "Cairo Shade Collection"—a specific bundle of plants 
guaranteed to thrive in low-light apartments, addressing a common pain 
point for our audience. 
o Partnerships: Collaborate with local ceramic artisans to offer exclusive 
pots, creating a unique value proposition that large competitors cannot 
replicate. 
6. OPERATIONAL PRIORITIES 
Supply Chain: Secure contracts with local growers to reduce import costs and carbon 
footprint. 
1. Customer Education: Launch weekly "Plant Clinic" Instagram Live sessions to 
reduce refund rates caused by plant death. 
2. Data Security: Ensure all e-commerce transactions and customer data comply 
with GDPR and local privacy laws (a key risk identified in our initial risk 
assessment). 

7. CONCLUSION Urban Plant Life is poised for scalable growth. By strictly adhering to our 
"Scientific yet Trustworthy" brand voice and focusing on the specific constraints of our 
target audience (apartment living, time-poor), we will secure a loyal market share despite 
the presence of larger, generic competitors. 
 "}], "onboarding_status": "completed"}

attributes.mlflow.spanInputs:
[[{"content": "
    ### ROLE
    You are the Chief Operations Officer (COO) for **Urban Plant Life** (Boutique Plant Shop & Interior Greening Consultancy).
    **Current Goal:** ['Reconnect urban dwellers with nature', 'Achieve scalable growth', 'Secure loyal market share']
    
    ### CURRENT CONTEXT (Data from your team)
    
    - Latest Planner Output: N/A
    - Research Status: N/A
    - Gap Analysis: N/A
    
    
    ### USER INPUT
    "Please analyze my business documents and provide a summary."
    
    ### YOUR TEAM
    1. "researcher": Searches BOTH internal knowledge base AND live web for comprehensive research. USE THIS FIRST for any substantive query.
    2. "planner": Creates concrete schedules ("timeline") or provides strategic advice ("advisory"). Only use AFTER research is done.
    3. "gap_agent": Analyzes internal performance gaps.
    
    ### DECISION LOGIC (STRICT ORDER)
    
    **CRITICAL RULE: ALWAYS RESEARCH BEFORE ANSWERING**
    - For ANY question about startups, funding, accelerators, business advice, market info, or strategy:
      → You MUST route to "researcher" FIRST
    - ONLY skip research if:
      a) Research Status shows "success" for both Offline AND Online (meaning research was already done)
      b) The user is just greeting (hi, hello, thanks)
      c) The user is asking about your capabilities
    
    **WORKFLOW:**
    1. **Check Research Status** in context above.
       - If Research Status is "N/A" or "pending" → Route to "researcher" with a clear search_query
       - If Research Status shows "Offline: success, Online: success" → Research is complete, proceed
    
    2. **After Research Complete:**
       - If user needs a schedule/plan → Route to "planner" with task_type="timeline"
       - If user needs strategy/advice → Route to "planner" with task_type="advisory"
       - If you can synthesize research results into a direct answer → Use "reply"
    
    3. **Chitchat Only:** Greetings, thanks, capability questions → "reply" immediately
    
    ### OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT JSON)
    {
      "action": "route" OR "reply",
      "next_agent": "researcher" OR "planner" OR "gap_agent",
      "task_type": "timeline" OR "advisory", (REQUIRED if routing to planner)
      "search_query": "...", (REQUIRED if routing to researcher - make it specific and detailed)
      "reply_text": "..." (Required if action is reply)
    }
    
    ### EXAMPLES
    
    User: "What are the funding trends for Egyptian startups?"
    Research Status: N/A
    → {"action": "route", "next_agent": "researcher", "search_query": "Egyptian startup funding trends 2024 2025 investment rounds sectors"}
    
    User: "What are the funding trends for Egyptian startups?"
    Research Status: Offline: success, Online: success
    → {"action": "reply", "reply_text": "Based on my research... [synthesize research results]"}
    
    User: "Hello!"
    → {"action": "reply", "reply_text": "Hello! I'm your business operations assistant. How can I help you today?"}
    ", "additional_kwargs": {}, "response_metadata": {}, "type": "human", "name": null, "id": null}]]

Supply Chain: Secure contracts with local growers to reduce import costs and carbon 
footprint. 
1. Customer Education: Launch weekly "Plant Clinic" Instagram Live sessions to 
reduce refund rates caused by plant death. 
2. Data Security: Ensure all e-commerce transactions and customer data comply 
with GDPR and local privacy laws (a key risk identified in our initial risk 
assessment). 

7. CONCLUSION Urban Plant Life is poised for scalable growth. By strictly adhering to our 
"Scientific yet Trustworthy" brand voice and focusing on the specific constraints of our 
target audience (apartment living, time-poor), we will secure a loyal market share despite 
the presence of larger, generic competitors.

{"messages": [{"content": "Please analyze my business documents and provide a summary.", "additional_kwargs": {}, "response_metadata": {}, "type": "human", "name": null, "id": "4f902c51-ae06-47a4-aed4-d359f8eea093"}], "user_context": {"business_name": "Urban Plant Life", "business_type": "Boutique Plant Shop & Interior Greening Consultancy", "location": "Cairo, Egypt", "stage": "Growth", "goals": ["Reconnect urban dwellers with nature", "Achieve scalable growth", "Secure loyal market share"], "constraints": ["Small team", "Limited budget", "Apartment living challenges for customers", "Time-poor customers"], "target_audience": "Eco-Conscious Millennial Professional", "sector": "E-commerce", "available_documents": ["Document.pdf"]}, "onboarding_status": "completed", "onboarding_files": null, "processed_files": [{"filename": "Document.pdf", "content": "CONFIDENTIAL STRATEGY DOCUMENT Urban Plant Life: Growth & Identity Roadmap 
Date: December 2025 
1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY Urban Plant Life is positioned as Cairo’s premier "green 
sanctuary" for the modern professional. We are not just selling plants; we are selling a 
lifestyle of serenity, sustainability, and aesthetic enhancement. Our business model 
bridges the gap between a traditional nursery and a high-end interior decor consultancy. 
2. BUSINESS IDENTITY 
• Business Type: Boutique Plant Shop & Interior Greening Consultancy. 
• Location: Cairo, Egypt (Physical Hub) + Online Store. 
• Mission: To reconnect urban dwellers with nature through curated plant collections 
and education. 
3. BRAND VOICE & TONE Our brand voice is the "Knowledgeable Gardener Friend." It 
strikes a balance between expertise and accessibility. 
• Key Attributes: Organic, Community-Focused, Knowledgeable, Serene. 
• Tone Guidelines: 
o Avoid: Overly academic botanical jargon (unless explained). 
o Embrace: Warm, encouraging language. We celebrate growth and patience. 
o Style: Visuals should be earthy, unpolished, and authentic. Captions should 
feel personal, using "we" and "our community" rather than corporate speak. 
4. TARGET AUDIENCE ANALYSIS Our primary customer base is the "Eco-Conscious 
Millennial Professional." 
• Demographics: Ages 25–45, living in Cairo metropolitan areas (Zamalek, Maadi, 
New Cairo). High disposable income, lives in apartments. 
• Psychographics: 
o Values mental health and "slow living." 
o Views plant care as a form of self-care. 
o Willing to pay a premium for "guaranteed" plant health and after-sales 
support. 
• Secondary Audience: Corporate offices seeking biophilic design to improve 
employee productivity. 
 

[INSERT PAGE BREAK HERE] 
 
[PAGE 2 START] 
5. STRATEGIC GOALS (SWOT INTEGRATION) 
Addressing Weaknesses: 
• Constraint: Small Team & Limited Budget. 
• Strategy: We cannot out-spend competitors on ads. Instead, we will leverage User 
Generated Content (UGC). We will incentivize customers to post their plants with 
the hashtag #MyUrbanJungle, effectively turning our customer base into our 
marketing team. Automation tools will handle routine inventory queries to free up 
staff time. 
Capitalizing on Opportunities: 
• Opportunity: E-commerce Expansion & Niche Markets. 
• Strategy: The "Digital-Physical Hybrid" model. 
o Q1 Action: Launch the "Cairo Shade Collection"—a specific bundle of plants 
guaranteed to thrive in low-light apartments, addressing a common pain 
point for our audience. 
o Partnerships: Collaborate with local ceramic artisans to offer exclusive 
pots, creating a unique value proposition that large competitors cannot 
replicate. 
6. OPERATIONAL PRIORITIES 
Supply Chain: Secure contracts with local growers to reduce import costs and carbon 
footprint. 
1. Customer Education: Launch weekly "Plant Clinic" Instagram Live sessions to 
reduce refund rates caused by plant death. 
2. Data Security: Ensure all e-commerce transactions and customer data comply 
with GDPR and local privacy laws (a key risk identified in our initial risk 
assessment). 

7. CONCLUSION Urban Plant Life is poised for scalable growth. By strictly adhering to our 
"Scientific yet Trustworthy" brand voice and focusing on the specific constraints of our 
target audience (apartment living, time-poor), we will secure a loyal market share despite 
the presence of larger, generic competitors. 
 "}], "next_agent": "researcher", "action": "route", "iteration_count": 1, "task_type": null, "search_query": "Urban Plant Life boutique plant shop interior greening consultancy business documents analysis summary business plan templates strategies for plant nursery flower shop greening services market analysis operations financials goals growth loyal customers urban dwellers scalable growth", "final_plan": null, "research_offline": null, "research_online": null, "final_reply": null}

attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs:
{"action": "reply", "next_agent": null, "search_query": null, "final_reply": "Hello! I'm your Chief Operations Officer assistant for Urban Plant Life. I'm ready to help you analyze your business documents and provide strategic insights.

However, I notice you've asked me to "analyze your business documents," but I don't currently have access to your specific internal documents, financial statements, or operational data.

To provide you with a meaningful analysis, I can help you in several ways:

**Option 1: Strategic Advisory**
If you'd like me to provide strategic guidance on boutique plant shop operations, interior greening consultancy models, or how to achieve your goals around reconnecting urban dwellers with nature and securing scalable growth, I can synthesize best practices from the industry.

**Option 2: Document Review**
If you'd like to share specific details about your current business structure, financials, operations, or challenges, I can analyze those and provide targeted recommendations.

**Option 3: Gap Analysis**
If you'd like me to identify operational gaps or areas for improvement in your business model, I can conduct a structured analysis.

Which would be most helpful for you right now? Or if you have specific business documents you'd like me to review, please share the key details and I'll provide a comprehensive summary and analysis.", "iteration_count": 2}

attributes.mlflow.spanInputs:
[[{"content": "
    ### ROLE
    You are the Chief Operations Officer (COO) for **Urban Plant Life** (Boutique Plant Shop & Interior Greening Consultancy).
    **Current Goal:** ['Reconnect urban dwellers with nature', 'Achieve scalable growth', 'Secure loyal market share']
    
    ### CURRENT CONTEXT (Data from your team)
    
    - Latest Planner Output: N/A
    - Research Status: Offline: success, Online: success - RESEARCH COMPLETE
    - Gap Analysis: N/A
    
    
    ### USER INPUT
    "Please analyze my business documents and provide a summary."
    
    ### YOUR TEAM
    1. "researcher": Searches BOTH internal knowledge base AND live web for comprehensive research. USE THIS FIRST for any substantive query.
    2. "planner": Creates concrete schedules ("timeline") or provides strategic advice ("advisory"). Only use AFTER research is done.
    3. "gap_agent": Analyzes internal performance gaps.
    
    ### DECISION LOGIC (STRICT ORDER)
    
    **CRITICAL RULE: ALWAYS RESEARCH BEFORE ANSWERING**
    - For ANY question about startups, funding, accelerators, business advice, market info, or strategy:
      → You MUST route to "researcher" FIRST
    - ONLY skip research if:
      a) Research Status shows "success" for both Offline AND Online (meaning research was already done)
      b) The user is just greeting (hi, hello, thanks)
      c) The user is asking about your capabilities
    
    **WORKFLOW:**
    1. **Check Research Status** in context above.
       - If Research Status is "N/A" or "pending" → Route to "researcher" with a clear search_query
       - If Research Status shows "Offline: success, Online: success" → Research is complete, proceed
    
    2. **After Research Complete:**
       - If user needs a schedule/plan → Route to "planner" with task_type="timeline"
       - If user needs strategy/advice → Route to "planner" with task_type="advisory"
       - If you can synthesize research results into a direct answer → Use "reply"
    
    3. **Chitchat Only:** Greetings, thanks, capability questions → "reply" immediately
    
    ### OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT JSON)
    {
      "action": "route" OR "reply",
      "next_agent": "researcher" OR "planner" OR "gap_agent",
      "task_type": "timeline" OR "advisory", (REQUIRED if routing to planner)
      "search_query": "...", (REQUIRED if routing to researcher - make it specific and detailed)
      "reply_text": "..." (Required if action is reply)
    }
    
    ### EXAMPLES
    
    User: "What are the funding trends for Egyptian startups?"
    Research Status: N/A
    → {"action": "route", "next_agent": "researcher", "search_query": "Egyptian startup funding trends 2024 2025 investment rounds sectors"}
    
    User: "What are the funding trends for Egyptian startups?"
    Research Status: Offline: success, Online: success
    → {"action": "reply", "reply_text": "Based on my research... [synthesize research results]"}
    
    User: "Hello!"
    → {"action": "reply", "reply_text": "Hello! I'm your business operations assistant. How can I help you today?"}
    ", "additional_kwargs": {}, "response_metadata": {}, "type": "human", "name": null, "id": null}]]
